Carbamazeptne (Caz), a wtdely ttsed antteptlepttc, ts kttowtt to be a photosenstttve dntg and the
[arm tssued by tlte manuiactnrer ltas been reported to exhtbtt a color cltange atter 3 days ot tllumtnatton
wtth a xenon lamp. Form dtverstty ot Caz ts also well known, and many reports have examtned tts
polymorphs [4,5], hydrate and solyate torms [so], and the relattortshtp between tts soltd tom and
phystcochemtcal properttes [7,8],

Recently, cocrystals have recetved constderable attentton as a new class at Al’l soltds. A cocrystal
ts deﬁned as a multtple crystalltne molecnlar Complex coextsttng through noncovalent tttteracttotts such
as hydrogen bondtng, 7K4! stacktng tnteracttons, and van der Waals torces [9,10] Cocrystals can alter
the phystcochemtcal properttes ot the AH wtthout modttytng tts tntrtnstc structure [tn], tn addttton,
the cocrystalltzatton techntque has been applted to a wtde range at drugs because tt does not requtre
proton transier betweett components, uttltke salt tormatton [t 1], C31 has been shown to [arm cocrystals
wtth yartous cocrystal tormers (cotorrners), tncludtng dtcarboxyltc actd and sacchartn (SAC) [12],
Favorable phystcochemtcal properttes ot these cocrysmls have been reported preytously. ullah et
al, reported the advanmges of a cocrystal ot Caz wtth succtntc actd (SuC) (CazeSuC) tn terms ot
aqueous solnbtltty, tn yttro drug release, and btoavatlabtltty [131. Accordtng to Htckey et al,, a cocrystal
of Caz wtth SAC (CazeSAC torm t) potenttally represents a ytable alternattve to the conventtonal
anhydrous polymorph due to tts phystcal attd chetmcal stabtltty attd oralbtoavatlabtltty [14]. As shown
tn a study by Porter ttt et al , a polytnorph exlsts tn a cocrystal nl Caz wtth SAC (CazeSAC tortn
ll) [1'5] Although many reports have analyzed Caz cocrystals, no studtes have tnvesttgated thetr
photostabtltttes. tn addttton, tewer studtes have tocused on the photosenstttytty ot cocrystals compared
wtth those concentrated on the conventtonal soltd torms [lérl‘l]

Thus, tn the present study, we prepared two polymorphs (Caz [mm 1 and torm ll) and
three cocrystals ot Caz (CazeSuC, CazeSAC [arm 1, and CHZSAC torm ll) and compared thetr
photostabtltttes wtth Caz iorrn ttt, whtch ts known to be a comparattvely stable [mm of Caz,
I’homsmbthty was assessed ustng colortmetrtc measurements, lovtbfrequency Kamnn spectroscopy,
Faunerstmnsfnrm tntrared reﬂeclxonibsmphon spectroscopy (FHR KAS) and solidsstme nuclear
magnettc resonance (SSNMa) ‘H splnrlalhce relaxatton ttme (n).
